steps.title: Identify the causal relationship
steps.content: The passage describes the physical cause (glaciers bearing down on the crust) and its effect (formation of the fjord). The transition must show that the second action resulted from the first.

steps.title: Match the consequence word
steps.content: ”As a result” explicitly marks consequence—when one action produces another. The other choices introduce wrong relationships: “in general” suggests a broad statement, “for example” introduces an exemplification, and “in contrast” signals opposition. That matches choice C — C is correct.
